title: Celestia SMP Season 1
description: Season 1 pack for Celestia SMP, now available to anyone
body:
This is a modpack made for season 1 of the Celestia SMP.

[Celestia SMP](https://celestiasmp.com/discord) is run by two _idiot_ who have no idea how to properly make modpacks and therefore this pack may or may not be optimized or balanced very well.

Features:

- Origins
- More (and cooler) structures
- shaders included
- Create (with addons)
- Painting
- Magic mods
- Xaero's map
- New world generation
- Overhauled enchanting
- Much more


## Spec suggestions
- 6-8GB of allocated RAM (~~when playing on servers only~~ even viable in single player)
- or 4GB without shaders
- should be able to run on any modern CPU, now including (probably) intel celerons
